channel.title: CNC Machining on Carter Watson
channel.description: Recent content in CNC Machining on Carter Watson

item.title: CNC Machinist
item.description: Responsibilities Produced parts on CNC mills and lathes Gained a better knowledge of CNC machines and the manufacturing process

item.title: CNC Machinist
item.description: Responsibilities Gained knowledge of CNC machines and the manufacturing process by working alongside a mentor
